SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description1Txt: FOUNDATION FOR NATIONAL PROGRESS$102,000 PRI ENABLED THE ORGANIZATION TO ALLOCATE RESOURCES IN KEEPING AN ACTIVE PRESENCE OVER THE WEEKENDS ON THEIR SOCIAL MEDIA OUTREACH TO READERS AND SUBSCRIBERS. THE ACTIVE USE OF SOCIAL MEDIA DURING THE WEEKEND NEWS CYCLE HELPED KEEP CONTINUITY IN MEDIA REPORTING THUS INCREASING READERSHIP DURING THESE DAYS. THE INCREASED REVENUE GENERATED BY THIS INITIATIVE PROVIDED THE FUNDS TO PAY BACK THE LOAN AND CREATED ITS OWN SUSTAINABLE REVENUE SOURCE FOR CONTINUING THE PRACTICE OF WEEKEND COVERAGE.
SumOfProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Description2Txt: HOURGLASS FILMS LLC$52,000 PRI GIVEN FOR PRODUCTION COSTS NEEDED FOR FINISHING THE ENVIRONMENTAL FILM TITLED "RIGHT TO HARM" WHICH FOCUSES ON CONCENTRATED ANIMAL FEEDING OPERATIONS (CAFO'S) AND THE EFFECT IT HAS ON HEALTH AND WELL BEING TO THE HUMAN INHABITANTS IN AND AROUND THE AREAS WHERE THEY OPERATE.

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: NO RESTRICTIONS, BUT INCLUDE A COPY OF IRS TAX EXEMPT DETERMINATION LETTER

RecipientBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: DUSABLE MUSEUM OF AFRICAN AMERICAN HISTORY INC
ENVIRONMENTAL LAW AND POLICY CENTER OF THE MIDWEST
JANE GOODALL INSTITUTE FOR WILDLIFE RESEARCH EDUCATION & CONSERVATION
OAK PARK RIVER FOREST COMMUNITY FOUNDATION
OAK PARK RIVER FOREST FOOD PANTRY
WINDOW TO THE WORLD COMMUNICATIONS INC

ContributorBusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: WILLIAM GEE IV DECLARATION OF TRUST

AllOtherProgramRelatedInvstGrp.Desc: ACCION, INC. $52,000 PRI WAS ISSUED AND INSERTED INTO THE OVERALL LENDERS STACK INVOLVED IN CONSTRUCTING AN INCUBATOR TRAINING CENTER AND PROCESSING SPACE FOR START UP FOOD COMPANIES IN THE GARFIELD PARK AREA.

AppliedToPriorYearElection.ElectionDesc: PURSUANT TO IRC SEC. 4942(H)(2) AND REG. 53.4942(A)-3(D)(2), THE FOUNDATION HEREBY ELECTS TO TREAT CURRENT YEAR QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS IN EXCESS OF THE IMMEDIATELY PRECEDING TAX YEAR'S UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME AS BEING MADE OUT OF UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME FROM THE TAX YEAR ENDING JULY 31, 2016.
